title: Disable legacy features settings are now GA
body:
To help migrate accounts and workspaces to Unity Catalog, two admin settings that disable legacy features are now generally available:

* [Disable legacy features](/aws/en/admin/account-settings/legacy-features): Account-level setting that disables access to DBFS, Hive Metastore, and No-isolation shared compute in new workspaces.
* [Disable access to Hive metastore](/aws/en/data-governance/unity-catalog/disable-hms): Workspace-level setting that disables access to the Hive metastore used by your workspace.
